condition.description: Defines an optional IAM condition that must be met for the binding to apply, using attributes like expression, title, and description.

database.description: Specifies the Spanner database to which the IAM binding will be applied. Must be in the format `projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/databases/{database}`.

instance.description: The Spanner instance to which the IAM binding will be applied; must exist in the same project and region.

members.description: List of IAM members to be bound to the specified role for the Spanner database.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to bind to members for the Spanner database. Must be a predefined Google Cloud role.
